name: Braciole (Gmbw75c)
recipeIngredient: Thinly sliced round steak, pounded flat
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the braciole by rolling the sliced steak tightly around a piece of white thread.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Brown the rolled meat in olive oil on all sides.
4. Add the browned braciole to your tomato sauce, ensuring no additional meats are used.
5. Slow cook the sauce until it is well combined.
6. Serve with rigatoni pasta topped with mozzarella and grated Romano cheese.
7. Enjoy with homemade garlic bread and a Bardilno (sp) wine for a perfect Sunday meal.
